chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صِفَةِ الْعِلْمِ وَ فَضْلِهِ وَ فَضْلِ الْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 2 – Description of the knowledge and its merits, and merits of the scholars

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/108)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/108)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلٌ رَاوِيَةٌ لِحَدِيثِكُمْ يَبُثُّ ذَلِكَ فِي النَّاسِ وَ يُشَدِّدُهُ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ وَ قُلُوبِ شِيعَتِكُمْ وَ لَعَلَّ عَابِداً مِنْ شِيعَتِكُمْ لَيْسَتْ لَهُ هَذِهِ الرِّوَايَةُ أَيُّهُمَا أَفْضَلُ قَالَ الرَّاوِيَةُ لِحَدِيثِنَا يَشُدُّ بِهِ قُلُوبَ شِيعَتِنَا أَفْضَلُ مِنْ أَلْفِ عَابِدٍ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, from Sa’dan Bin Muslim, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man, a reporter of your<sup>asws</sup> Ahadeeth, transmitting it among the people and fastening them into their hearts and the hearts of your<sup>asws</sup> Shias, and there is a worshipper from your<sup>asws</sup> Shias, who do not transmit (the Ahadeeth) for them (Shias), which of the two is superior?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The transmitter of our<sup>asws</sup> Ahadeeth, fastening the hearts of our<sup>asws</sup> Shias with it, is superior to a thousand worshippers’.
en.sarwar: 9. Al-Hassan ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Ishaq from Sa‘dan ibn Muslim from Mu‘awiya ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following. “I asked (Imam) abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.), “There is a man who recounts your Hadith and spreads them among people and ties them to their hearts and the hearts of your followers. Also perhaps there is a worshipper among your followers who does not narrate your Hadith. Which of these two people is better?” The Imam replied, “The one who narrates our Hadith and ties them up to the hearts of our followers is better than seventy thousand worshippers.”
